system.description: Crane cars are used to load or unload flatbed cars, right derailed train cars, and anything else a crane can be used for. The crane’s stabilizers must be deployed to lift exceptionally heavy cargo or train cars. This takes a full action for each of the 4 stabilizer legs if done in combat. The crane runs off of cryosene and has its own tank which can hold 1 barrel and run for 2 Quarters from full.
